star_1.text: Don't waster your time. I have no issues with spending money on a game. However, I refuse to spend money on a game that doesn't work. Your ship will randomly jump around, which can be temporarily fixed by pausing, but when you're surrounded or in the middle of a fight, that's not always feasible. Now my ship just randomly explodes? Not hit. Didn't touch anything. Just explodes for no reason. I'll be patiently waiting for your computer generated response. We all know a fix isn't an option.

Fun at first, enjoyed the first few hours playing. Lots of ads but you can ignore them. Unfortunately, bosses quickly become impossible to beat without spending money (which is the point, I'm sure). Menus are too busy and no idea what any of the stuff does or means. I could have overlooked everything if it were possible to progress without spending money. I support games by using the ad options, with this game it's not enough to be able to progress unless you pay. You'll see. Uninstall!

Ad-ridden money grab that is no longer worth playing. A year ago, ads were 30 seconds tops. 1 ad got you whatever reward you were going for. Now, every single ad is a MINIMUM of 30 seconds, and they're ALWAYS doubled up. So you watch 2 ads (occasionally 3!), totaling over a minute in length to get one spin of a wheel. If you have to watch multiple ads, like for a character puzzle piece? 6 "ads" = nearly 10 minutes of advertising. More time is spent on ads than actually playing the game!

Do not waste your time with this game! It is fun at first, but after a little while the levels become completely impossible without major upgrades to your ship. The game has about a dozen forms of in-game currency, most of which there is no way to earn through playing. To get anything significant, you have to pay out $100's in cash. They are literally selling 'packages' of in game currency for over $100. What a joke. This app should be removed from the play store

If you want a game to throw all your money away, this is it. Just keeps on adding ad ons to over power the next player, all that costs a lot. Been playing for a year or more and have several 100s of dollars in it. Have to keep buying more to even when. I am definitely through and will let everyone else spend thier money. Thanks for the ride, but time to get off the train.

Dumb after a couple weeks. Like other people have said it is really fun at first, but despite response on this thread you will not progress past a certain point unless you pay $$$. Never seen a game in the play store that sells things for up to a $100. The videos are also misleading. I watched 30 of them over a couple days in front of the TV and got a "3 star ship" that is worthless and worse than the first green one. Buy an XBox for the same amount of money. Videos are a scam

DO NOT BELIEVE THEIR REPSONE! WARNING, PLEASE READ!!! Onesoft are THEIVES!! I lost all my ships and power from this game. I have given this company very much money and they will not rectify the problem. They keep going round in circles with me for 2 weeks and keep saying they fixed the issue. We are asked to log in to save your progress but yet I lost it all. I am so upset and ask anyone here "DO NOT" pay them one cent. I am sure they will say they have fixed the issue but they have not.

Is this game fun? Maybe. I couldn't tell because I spent more time watching ad videos than playing the game. Want to double your earnings for a level? Watch a video. Want to get a free chest? Watch 5 videos. Want to unlock a slightly better ship (well...a different one, anyway)? Watch between 30 and 120 ad videos. That's not a joke. You really have to sit through 120 30-second ads to unlock some ships. That is literally an hour of ads and no way to bypass even by paying. Play something else.

The game itself is fun. Takes me back to playing in the arcade. However the 1 star rating is due to the excessive advertisements that pop up in the game! Remove the ads and it would be perfect! Developer's response claims ads aren't forced yet anytime there's a pause in game play such as level changes an ad/vid pops up that you have to wait at least 30 seconds to be able to skip it. This in itself is intrusive!!

Just a couple examples of how incredibly greedy the developers are: 1. You will quickly need to level up your ship to progress. The game uses puzzle pieces. You need at least 160 pieces to upgrade. You can watch 5 ads to get ONE puzzle piece. One. 2. When you have "wingmen" ships, upgrading them increases their damage output by like 0.2! Literally less than 0.1%! And those upgrades quickly get expensive if you are trying to acquire them through game play. Avoid greedy developers at all costs.

I LOVE the game, but the ads are ridiculous. I am fine with single click ads, but the tripple click to exit ads are just insane. I did spend to see if it would reduce the ad quantities, but no luck. Sadly, I had to uninstall the game. This is one of the games I would keep playing if changes were made. So, the IDIOT developer responded that I could watch ads or not. True. but COMPLETELY missed my point. I didn't say that I had a problem watching ads. I have a problem with the type of ad.

Under "data safety" it says you can request that your data be deleted. That's a lie. I requested it and they said they can't. I also removed app access permissions from my gmail several times and it automatically reinstates them. They said the only way to have the data deleted is to factory reset your phone. Update: After I said I was reporting this app, they say there is a way to delete the account but it's a "secret hidden button". That it's only available when a new version is released. 🙄

This app has gone way downhill. While they improve some things, the ads are now almost all 1 min or more, with multiple pauses for input that you can't bypass or wait out. Additionally, many times, the ads launch a browser or the app store when you (or even if you don't) hit outside of the tiny "x'. They often violate REQUIRED ''ads rules" by not displaying a countdown timer, or if they do at some points, it' so only until the Next ad begins. Not COOL !!!

The game is super fun, but you hit a pay wall that is too expensive They want wayyyyyy too much money. Major disappointment. $75 dollars for a new ship. Most upgrades cost real money. I've been playing without spending and it just sucks after a while because everything costs too much. You would have to spend thousands to keep up and be competitive with other players. Just greedy.

For your space shooters game I'm having extreme extreme difficulty unlocking ships. In particular and the only one I care about is the black dragon ship. It's not unlockable. How is this ship unlocked? There's not even an option to buy it with real money. As the creators of this game I'm hoping you can help. It's your game after all. Please help! I don't know what to do and I'm starting to think you guys disabled ships so we can't use some of them and didn't delete them from the game. HELP!!PLZ!

Game play is decent and addictive for the very short term. However, in order to make any progress after a certain point, u basically have to spend real money, especially after the 2nd world. Things are crazy expensive too and the game is just too cheap feeling to spend $. If u don't spend money you can maybe upgrade 1 of this ships to maaaybe the second level with the available resources to earn. Extreme amounts of ads and opportunity to watch an ad in so many places. Overall bummer.

I've spent $200+ on this game, watched countless ads (including unlocking watching 90 ads!), upgraded ships to high levels, logged in almost daily for around a year. Pros: Great graphics, cool varied ships, side ships, smooth gameplay. Seasonal events giving limited items, eg. during Halloween, Xmas, Valentine's day, etc. Cons: Very Ad heavy. Way, way too many types of resources and currencies. Every trick in the book to make you spend. No wiki to look up. Too arduous to level up. Uninstalled

Well, apparently the makers of this game have chosen to call me a liar, rather than admit that -- you watch the advertisements and often do NOT get rewarded. This has consistently been my experience and I have no reason to tell lies about some little app. The ads load right up and play 100% of the time. At least half of the time, you won't get any points for watching -- and the game will reset. But boy howdy, they sure know how to program those ads!

short levels and the whole app is full to the brim with ads it may be one of the worst I've seen for the number of ads edit to address the asinine response, obviously you can pay to remove ads but the free version is filled in such a way that it is largely unplayable with a continuous assault of ads your auto response is a waste of everyone's time

A money grab game for nostalgic adult players. The further you progress into the game the more your options narrow as you realise how all the good equipment is only obtainable through cash and it's not even a little cash, as some offers reach over 100 €! The amount of ads is suffocating. The worst part is the inept, useless customer service who can only communicate in broken English and offers no real help to the many recurring bugs that plague the game.

star_2.text: The game is fun to play at first but when you get into the player-versus-player you realize there is a problem. Almost every player you are matched against happens to have a ship that cost $20 to purchase. They also have maxed out stats. So either it is faking player-versus-player characters in a manner that is almost impossible to beat or there is something terribly wrong with the matching process and just happens to match you with people who has spent a lot of money on the game. It's also annoying when you have purchased avoiding ads but it still decides to pop up with advertisements for in-game purchases. That's still an advertisement

In the beginning this game was very fun and a real time sink. I was leveling up fast and blowing through levels. Now about four months in when the levels never end, after seeing countless ads, and sinking my money in to upgrade a ship, get it topped off, upgrading yet another ship that should be stronger, but isn't really The game has just been a waste of money as they keep introducing new levels and marginally more powerful ships It only seems like they will never end that repotitious cycle until they total sink your wallet (and trust me Ive spent a lot of money) and you just quit due to sheer boredom or the game itself slowing to a drag as you decide whether to invest even more money or upgrade the umpteenth new ship slowly I gave up. It wasn't worth the effort

I really like this game, graphics are nice, the bosses are interesting and even a little challenging sometimes, and ads are optional to watch. However, the mystery crate in the shop is bugged out or something because I spent 50 minutes waiting and watching the 5 ads to open it and it literally just wouldn't when I was done. An error message saying "wait for the process to finish" or something popped up. I waited for the night and tried again in the morning, but now it's saying I already have.

There are maybe 3 hours of gameplay before you will be either forced to grind for days to reach a new level or pay a lot of money. The graphics and creativity that went into this game are not eniugh to justify more than $5. The UI is unclear, i have no idea what i am getting half the time. Then of course the constant assault of ads and reminders to buy something.

Graphics & game play are good. If you don't care about advancing or PVP, it's fine. But this is a pay-to-play app - you will eventually be unable to progress of you don't spend money. And it's not like you could spend $10 and have a playable game - you'd have to spend hundreds to compete with top players. Gross. Also the ads. I don't mind some ads (although I'd prefer a paid, ad-free option). But I hate that these are multi-part ads that you have to tap 3 times to get through.

This game was ok for a few days, but it gets to a must pay if you want to advance situation pretty quickly. Even if you watch all the ads for extra loot boxes, you still end up with something you have to pay for. You would think with all the ads that you could afford to give the player a better ship now and then. Oh well....delete.

I was on the fence. One star, two stars or three. I spent so much time on this game, it really is quite enjoyable for those brief times when you need to kill time, but the ads keep increasing, the constant popups to pay real money for game addons and upgrades. I was fine enough watching the ads. I figured it was my way of helping to pay for the game. But now i cant even play player vs player any longer without logging in to my gmail or facebook.

I've been playing the game for a couple years now. A decent game for sure. BUT in the past month I have had commercials that I've watched expecting the given reward. But instead of being granted the reward, the game restarts. I have a hard time believing that Rocket Studio is unable to prooerly integrate commercials into their software. A greedy technique for sure. Instead if watching the same commercial 20 times in a row, I think I'll read a book instead.

good game, but they make you use rare items and money you don't have a lot. closes the game most of the time after an ad, earning the devs more money, without giving you anything. it's also the same gameplay as about every space shooter on Google play. edit: you don't need 12 space shooters and a super Mario ripoff.

why there are more than 10 waves in a campaign level. few suggestions for gameplay improvisation: 1. allow more ships and miniships to unlock through completing certain level. 2. allow equipment to buy through gems or coins. 3. allow vip points through clearing campaign levels. 4. allow ship to merge with any other ship without requirement of upgrading to 6 star. 5. allow higher star ship cards to share through guild. 6. fix matches in PvP mode, only between similar level players.

I love this game and would love to change my review to 5 STARS, but, for me anyway, the game is ruined because when I choose to watch an ad for rewards no "x" or ">>" button shows up after the timer expires and I am just stuck on the ad screen. I am then forced to close the app and have recieved no rewards when I open it back up. I don't know if this is caused by some setting on my phone, but it's very frustrating and I couldn't find answers online.

I want to leave a label about this game to myself. Google play store doesn't have that feature, yet. so my review is that it's ONE TOUCH DEAD. I like the chance to recover from mistakes, learn and grow. this game does not provide that. if STRESS and Rote memory is fun, then this is the game for you.

update 01/16/2026 Since the last update a couple of days ago the developers have made the game harder, put in longer ads, and given less points for completing an objective. I've played 2 years under this name, and played about 2 years under a different name. The reason I'm not playing under the first name is because the admins wouldn't allow me to play under my original name because of a phone change. I drop it to two stars.

fun game but don't ever expect to make serious progress unless you watch more time in ads then you do playing the game. or you can literally spend tens of thousands or more. ultra disappointing if you are an old school gamer and like challenges and progress where things can be achieved through skill not payn payn pay to play or watch 100000s of ads or dump over 8 hours a week to even slightly progress.

the game is ok but you can't pass the 3rd planet without spending lots of money. the levels are too hard without buying very expensive ships, with ships coming at you at impossible speed. the pvp is also rigged. so dont bother starting!
it's alright at the start but as you progress and will need stronger weapons,you'll be stuck unless spending money and buying extras ,I personally deleting this one 👎👎👎👎
moneygrab, horribly slow progress, boring levels with basically one upgrade to your weapon. there are way better shooting games out there

Kind of fun if simple, levels are either trivial or nearly impossible. Don't bother trying the pvp unless you're willing to spend hundreds on ships and upgrades. After noticing people used mostly premium stuff in pvp (3 or 4 big losses, I never won any) I started checking, the minimum any of the opponents had spent was ~140euros, just in premium ships, the highest was hundreds. For litetally hundreds of euros there's way better games, even on mobile.
the ads have gotten longer. 60+ second ads that auto-open the play store or require you to open the store to dismiss the ad.
it ok same thing over and over. you should be able to use the red gems to buy anyone of them after the second world 🌎. it gets boring after 2 years.

star_3.text: Can be frustrating. Takes a while to learn all the ins and outs of the game. Still learning new things. Some of the changes/updates are bad. Lots of cheaters out there on PVP. You are winning the round all the way through but suddenly they are able to score 20K points in the last few seconds. Or they jump out to a 15k point lead in the first 10 seconds of the game when it is normally impossible to score that high that fast.

Fun game for the most part but there are some odd quirks that take away from the enjoyment. For example Pvp was executed poorly from the players standpoint. Because of their point system, what could have been a fun challenge of skill turns into a game to see how many times you can change your ship... boring. There are also long stretches where one ship at a time will appear, leaving little opportunity to score. Probably a clever ploy to get people to spend money on ship advancement.

Quite fun, fast-paced arcade action with some homages (e.g. enemy ship formation) to old school classics like Space Invaders and Galaga. Spam ads to buy something every couple of stages is annoying. Unlock ships and upgrades through regular playback. Your ship is destroyed with anything, in one shot, be it stray bullet or meteor. Very responsive and intuitive controls.

Fun to play for the very short periods of time you're allowed to actually play the game, but the ads are horrifically long and interrupt game play so frequently and for so bloody long, you don't really feel like it's much fun, really. It's as if they took Galaga or Galaxian and made it irritating to play. The interface for "leveling up" is not legible and is, therefore, useless. They offer paying $18.99 from time to time to bypass the leveling up, but sorely overpriced it. Uninstalled.

Fun game. PVP can be annoying sometimes when you have to wait for more enemies to appear while your opponent is racking up points. I've had more than a few matches where there was 10-15 seconds left on the timer, I was ahead, but didn't get anymore enemies to shoot and my opponent was able to come from behind and win.

more than 10 waves in a level is not good. it seems game maker wants it's users to stick to the screen for a very long time. the targets in event seems to be impossible, if you do not purchase in-game items. make the levels more user friendly so that users can get some motivation to play further, rather than stuck at some level.

game is fun but we need to see ad's to get rewards. that's also okay. but the scam is they ask to see 1 ad, and show the same add which may be 15 seconds or 30 secs or more for 4 or 5 or 6 times .. really frustrating.. kind of felt to be scammed..

Be careful! This developer allows their advertisers to install other game apps on your phone without permission. Cash frenzy is the main culprit. When the ad plays, it installs it on your phone without your permission. This is a breach of security and privacy that this developer allows. This developer needs to address this with their advertisers. Other than this major security issue, the game is pretty fun. Don't bother telling me to contact customer support. This is a problem with your app

This game is great. However, the ads are not able to be closed after watching them. I am not sure what the issue is, but it never gives me an option to close it after watching. This has cost me a lot of double currency.
Great game, constant connection issues even with full WiFi, probs scam to get u to buy stuff. only program that can not connect to the internet.
this game is super addicting and fun. but honestly I've missed out on hundreds of thousands of gold because the odds don't work properly sometimes and I don't get my multiplier for watching them
got this for my 8 year old. he loves it, except for when the Ads come on, and they are not possible to get out of, which really really sucks. please enable a buy to disable ads

it's a very nice and a love it but I have a little bit of trouble with this game what happens is that sometimes ,maybe I lost to a game and and I watch an ad the moment I try getting back to my game it restart the hole entire game over and some games are super hard for a human to defeat please have mercy on us and make it a bit easier for us to play
I don't have any good stuff to play on my onn.8 table pro for the first time to get the first player in the game.

The game is pretty easy and understandable but also pretty grindy, which can make it boring and unappealing at some point. With the limited* (i have not unlocked every single one) cast of ships that you can get without paying, and the rest of the ships and other materials to upgrade them being obtained by paying makes this game seem like another "P2W greedy game". Ads are mostly optional and rarely in your face, so that's another thing going for it. Overall, 3 stars because of the P2W issue.
really good game but can't progress without spending lots of money. more than 2 years of playing, buying a couple of ships and still haven't merged 1 ship.

It looks cool but... it's boring. I get that it's starter levels but I bailed after beating 5 first levels because I barely need to move my ship to "win". I just sit there and wait for the ship to kill useless flying bots who fire about 3 shots per wave and take forever to destroy. I am sure it's gonna pick up later but I am not sitting through another 10 leveles waiting for it to happen. I mean I played a lot in space shooters years ago, this is just not engaging.
I like the game but the past few weeks the game crashing alot already some levels are difficult to achieve and now is crashing.. Please fix it.

I've been playing this game for a very long time but for some unknown reason, I get way less points for doing the same thing in pvp mode. I know this for a fact because during the falling rocks sequences, my opponent could be thousands of points behind me, I destroy every single rock, but his/her score is now higher than mine! It's also easy to see during the sets where very few enemy ships are released. I dont understand why?!? I also cash in the stars to get more bonus points, coin bonuses etc.

The game is okay. It's not very challenging. But it will do if you have a little time to burn. I gave it 3 stars because of the amount of commercials after each session and after the 2 required commercials are complete there is no way to X out and return to the game. When you tap on the arrow at the top of the screen you are redirected to Google Play. It's a pain in the butt. For this reason I will be Uninstalling this game.

star_4.text: I really like this game but my issue with it is of course the ads. there's an ad after every level that you play and what frustrates me is they give you an option to watch an ad in order to continue where you died. well I watched the ad and guess what? I can't get back to the game. this has been happening with a lot of apps and it is frustrating.

I'm constantly matched up against people who aren't nearly the same level as I am. PvP rank seems to be useless with matchmaking, and levels with regards to power ups are not nearly the same. Essentially... I'm consistently set up for failure. I love this game and I've played it for years, however these have been consistent issues. I hope to see changes in the aforementioned issues in the near future. Sincerely, a dedicated player.

This game is pretty entertaining, a good mix of challenging but hits a roadblock at level 10. You can play w/o buying stuff for early levels, not that they don't try to get you to spend. Ads are offered as second chances and to earn items - reasonable trade-off. Complaint: it is tough to see what resources you've earned in the game, and you have to guess what you have. Lots of graphics on the control board, but good luck interpreting it.

Over all, this is one of the better shooters I have played. There is some out of pocket $. However, there are plenty of power ups and rewards to earn through play. I gave it 4 stars instead of 5 because the "BOMBS" are hard to come by. It could take days before you get a bomb. I think bombs should be added like a power up. And there should be no limit to how many you can keep. Please more bombs :) thanks for a great game.

The game is good and more challenging however after changing my handset, most of my ships disappeared but my scores did not change. lately since January this year no short videos are available for watching. l can't keep buying ships again and again. l recommend this app, but it needs some serious user friendly improvements.

the game is quite easy and fun, but the problem why I put it on 4 stars is because - each time I use my internet to log into the game and to claim rewards, the game automatically kicks me out of the game. So please fix it. thank you
Excellent game and definitely one of my few favorite actually...and I am very happy to be able to play it..I like the graphics and features of this game in particular... thanks Guys!
You can play for free it will be slow leveling up anything. But it still fun way pass time . You can which video's but they don't make you watch them .

This isn't bad. I imagine a free player would probably have a hard time. There are tons of currencies and options to buy them for real money. This money tatic knocked off a star. The game itself is pretty fun. i do recommend buying a good plane when they go on sale, like one of the 20 dollar ones for 10 bucks. Wish there was a no ad option. Overall though this really isn't a bad shooter and some packages and plane discounts are worth spending real money on.
This game is very good and fun. We can talk with others. But the problem is if I change my name, I can't get the old name back.
I like it cuz it's reminiscent of the old Galaga game, but updated! A lot of different bosses! And that's a plus for me!

The game is great to play, but if getting credit for ads to get items, the hell fire miniship for example is completely broken. You get to a demo and never get back to the game for credit. Happens with most ads for other games.
Better control of the ship would be great. Plus a little bit more challenging also. Other than that it's a good game.
Sorry my poor English language because I live in Philippines. Hi, this game give me nogalista, fun and cool. But I want bringing the old version of this game and the boss too so that's it.

Fun to play but your fun will be limited if you don't spend a lot of money and I mean A LOT also it keeps crashing constantly with messages like server not working, network error and can't connect to server when you're in the middle of a game.

The game has many things like levels, guild, boss, PvPs, etc. It's impossible to have a dearth of activities even if you have all the ships and levels. You don't need anything except Internet to keep you engaged. The bug I stated before is fixed. Overall working is fairly good. One thing, this game lures us for paying money. But it is very much possible to progress without paying. So I recommend, if you are looking for a nice game, and you won't give up even on losing many times, install this.
A fun and time passing game. Definitely worth the download

I have is not with the ads but there is a ad that forces me to the Play store, it Crashes the game because it's demanding so much room during high definition it won't play all the way. it freezes, then at the end of the ad it doesn't say continue in a full length bubble, a short rounded bubble that has a brake in the yellow timeline & top, this forces the player to close&reload the game,, losing your game point

Wonderful gaming experience. But it's not too nice for just 1 bullet from enemies ship to destroy the gamers ship. Reasons being that in most cases it take up to 3 to 6 bullet from the gamers ship to kill an enemy ship. Before one gets to use a gem or coins for continuation, the ship should be able to withstand 5 to 7 bullets before being destroyed.
Good game, patience and limiting your ship numbers is rewarded. The cost of getting resources for highest level ships are way to high, whale territory. Join a guild, very helpful.

star_5.text: Easy to learn, controls are pretty simple, very entertaining. This game very much reminds me of some of the great arcade games from the 80's and 90's. I could spend hours playing this. It's also refreshing that the free version isn't overly saturated with ads like most free to play mobile games. So far it also doesn't give that "pay to win" feel of a lot of free to plays. Got a long car ride? Want to zone out and ignore society? Or just want to pass time? Play this game.

No issues so far!!! And it's one of the few games that does not make you pay to progress. Although ads are the way you pay, which can be a little annoying after a while....i will just skip the ad and loose the prize just so I don't have to watch it. Lol. I do think the prices for some of the ships and packages are ridiculous. I would never pay $20 for a spaceship or a chest. No issues with crashing so far. So to wrap this up, great game guys!! Look forward to what's to come 😁

Fantastic, addicting game play that is balanced and the perfect difficulty. They don't force ads onto you, giving you the option to watch ads after some missions but always giving you a good amount of rewards for it. Most ships you have to pay money for but the selection given is more than enough in my opinion. Endless mode is fun to play and the respawn price is fairly cheap. Also killer music.

It's a fun and challenging shooter game with many different levels, challenges, and ways to earn points, coins and gems. To make your ships have better fire power, better protection while gaining power boasts and different kinds of weapons. Also, has multiple levels to beat, yet it takes time to complete each level.

Fire this app up and prepare to be transported immediately to the 1980's because the colorful graphics, spot-on music and top-down shooter gameplay will strongly remind you of Galaga & similar games. But Space Shooter is no mere homage to Galaga. Its tight control mechanism, sophisticated enemies and engaging gameplay work together to provide a satisfying gaming experience that sets a new standard of awesomeness for this type of game (which is F2P and the paid version is only $0.99). Nice!

I like the trial of this app, you can really shoot the objects and interact with it. I've downloaded it but I haven't played it yet, I'm liking to use some headphones while I play ⏯️ so I'm not bothered.

Best game ever no ads, no stupid pop upps and i use to play this scince i was 5 in 2019 now ive been playing for 7 years i dont miss old this game i miss being happy Thank you 1SOFT for the amazing memories

Super addictive great fan support. Slow but not too slow to level up unless u wanna pay or watch adds, which is fair sorta. They match likewise players. I enjoy it, it short matches and interactive fast paced. Play events, work on 3 ships and skills get equipment. In cooperative event mode ull earnt token to get new things.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ “Space Shooter is an outstanding game! The gameplay is fast, smooth, and incredibly fun. The latest updates, events, and mythic skins always keep the game exciting. The graphics, sound effects, and controls are all top-notch. Easily one of the best space arcade games — highly recommended!”

I’m really enjoying Space Shooters! As a child, we used to play this game on classic video game consoles, and getting to play it again on my phone brings back so many wonderful childhood memories. The gameplay is fun, smooth, and nostalgic. Thank you for creating a game that brings back the charm of the old days while still feeling exciting and fresh today! Keep up the great work! Additionally, there are no distractions with ads.. thus playing more enjoyable ☺️
this game is fun the bosses get harder each level I don't know why bosses are on levels that are supposed to be boss levels but that makes the game more hard and I like hard games

excellent game, give chance to grow, to free players, very fairly, really tension free and goal oriented game, keep it up, plz allow ship thunder and pioneer or other ship, for free player to move further in this game, tysvm, and if possible use 15 sec or 20 sec ads few ads are 1 min long esp from google play daraz and few others .. thank you so mvey much ... i am now vip 8 and 25.4 level ... really enjoyable ... and help us senior citizens for cognitive response, thanks for pioneer opening free

I absolutely love this game I remember playing this game and Standing up and playing this big huge game 🎮 that looked like a TV in a box with joysticks. 🕹 Lol Idk how else to explain it to the new people, 😅 lol. kids would die if they had to save their quarters and then ride their bikes to the local store just to play a game for an hour, or till their money ran out. "I Serve Space Shooter Galaxy" is an exhilarating and action-packed game that plunges players into the vast expanse of outer space, where they assume the role of a skilled pilot navigating a spacecraft through a series of intense battles against a variety of alien adversaries. The game features a rich array of spaceships, each with unique attributes and capabilities, allowing players to customize their fleet to suit their personal play style.
